families.name: Ni-based Superalloys
families.description: SEM micrographs of γ/γ′ microstructure in Ni-based superalloys. Semantic segmentation of matrix, secondary γ′, and tertiary γ′ phases.
families.pairing_rule: image.tif pairs with image_mask.tif in the annot folder
families.notes: Super2 and Super3 include a different_test split (held-out imaging conditions). Super3 has only 2 training images — a low-data regime.

families.name: Environmental Barrier Coatings
families.description: SEM images of environmental barrier coatings with oxide and crack phases. Binary benchmark tasks typically merge oxide vs background and ignore cracks.
families.pairing_rule: same filename in image and annot folders
families.notes: Grayscale mask values 0/1/2. Crack class is often excluded in binary oxide segmentation.

instance_segmentation.name: Melt pool instance segmentation
instance_segmentation.description: 512×512 PNG tiles with COCO annotations for melt pool detection (NASA MMDetection Mask R-CNN demo).

examples.description: Reference assets from NASA notebooks — classification sample, ImageNet comparison, XAI heatmaps, prediction comparisons.

paths.caption: Microscopy sample used in the classification notebook
